extracted_text_snippet: Marcus & Millichap's research services division is dedicated to providing our clients with cutting-edge market research and innovative insights. We produce research reports and videos covering over a dozen property types, across the United States and Canada, and a variety of market conditions, all to help our clients make better, more informed decisions.
